description: Deal Service Dead Code & Minor Fixes. (1) 11 dead service methods unreachable from router: listOpportunities, advanceStage, updateValue, updateProbability, updateExpectedCloseDate, reopenOpportunity, getPipelineForecast, getOpportunitiesClosingSoon, getHighValueOpportunities, getOpportunitiesByAccount, getOpportunitiesByContact, getWinRateStatistics (B-13). Decide: wire to router or remove. (2) toMoney/toPercentage silent zero fallback on DB corruption (B-14). (3) TOCTOU in stage transitions — no optimistic locking (B-16). (4) Event publish failure swallowed with console.error only (B-17). (5) DealQuickView is a 49-line stub not used anywhere (F-13). (6) RecommendedActions.onActionClick not wired at forecast page level (F-18). (7) Sidebar deals config settingsHref points to /settings/deals instead of /settings/pipeline (W-03). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 6-7.

wiring_complete.target: Zero dead code methods; zero silent error swallowing

notes: Deal/opportunity domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md.
